title: Ship v7.7 Adoption-Grade v7 Runtime
description: Implement the v7.7 release slice: extend adoption proof so a fresh managed project produces bounded v7 runtime evidence including readiness, context integrity, work execution packet, requirement coverage, session export, and human-readable boundaries.
triage_notes: v7.7 implementation, runtime evidence, and adoption benchmark AP-001 through AP-011 are ready for release verification.
